info.english_meaning: to goto drip to ooze to flow
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: srutO ca drume  Su sru gatAvityeke ' iti DA.kA. vyA. (2 - 34)

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'himavataH prasravanti sinDO samahaH saNgamaH' (aTarva॰6.2.1) prasravanti=prasyandante=pravahanti=praBavanti
'ruDireRAvasiktANgaM prasravantaM yaTA'calam' (BA॰anu॰1.3) prasravantaM nirBaravantamityAha
'nA''tapatiM prasrAvayet' (Sa॰brA॰14.1.1.33) sUrye vitapamAne na mehedityarTaH
'sa yatpurEtasya homAtprasarpedvA pra vA srAvayet' (Sa॰brA॰4.2.4.8) ukto'rTaH
'sravadDiH SoRitaM gAtrEH prasrutAviva vAraRO (BA॰droRa॰98.23) prasrutO praBinnO madavAri vimuYcantO
'ye nadInAM saMsravantyutsAsaH sadamakzitAH' (aTarva 1153) saMsravanti=syandante
'imaM gozWaM paSavaH saMsravantu' (aTarva0 2262) saMsravantu=prApnuvantu
'saMsravAn samavanIya' (ASva0 gf0 486) arGyadAnAvaSizwA ApaH saMsravAH
'saMsravaBAgA: sTa' (vA0 saM0 218) vilInamAjyaM saMsravaH
'…tezAM saMsrAvavacCuciriti' (bO0 Da0 15819) saMtrAvaH=lAlA
'saMsrAvyeRa havizA juhomi' (aTarva0 1911) samyak srAvaH saMsrAvaH tamarhatIti saMsrAvyaM (haviH) Ajyapaya Adi
'samavasrave BaktaSaraRaM kArayet' (ASva0 gf0 277) yena paTA''po nirgacCanti sa deSaH samavasrava iti nArAyaRo vfttikAraH
'udakAni ca dUzayet avasrAvayecca' (kO0 a0 12514) avasrAvayet parivAhayet
'yo mahatyarTasamudaye sTitaH kadaryaH sanniDatte'vaniDatte'vasrAvayati' (kO0 a0 2925) avasrAvayati vizayAntaraM (deSAntaraM) saMkramayati
'koSadaRqanicayarakzAviDAnAnyavasrAvayizyAmi' (kO0 a0 948) avasrAvayizyAmi DvaMsayizyAmi
'tadatikrame vidyAkarma niHsravati brahma sahApatyAdetasmAt' (Apa0 Da0 152) niHsArayatItyarTaH
'kreyo vA niHsravastasmAd vaRijAM lABakftsmftaH' (yAjYa0 2251) niHsravo'vaSezaH
'kadAcittaM jalasTAyaM (=kzudrajalASayam) matsyabanDAH samantataH niH srAvayAmAsuH…' (BA0 SAM0 1375).. parivAhayAYcakrurityarTaH
'sa tu bARavarotpIqAd visravatyasfgulbaRam' (BA0 vana0 218) visravati muYcati ulbaRamutkawam
'Cidro hi yajYo Binna ivodaDirvisravati' (go0 brA0 uttara0 25) visravati Scyotati kzarati udaDiH kalaSaH
'jalaM visrAvayetsarvamavisrAvyaM ca dUzayet' (BA0 SAM0 6939) visrAvayet parivAhayet
'patiSokAturAM SuzkAM nadIM visrAvitAmiva' (rA0 51917) visrAvitAM roDoBaNgAdinA nirgamitajalAm kftaparIvAhAm
'savitarkavicAramApa SAntaM praTamaM DyAnamanAsravaprakAram' (budDa0 510) AsravaH kleSaH AdInavAsravO kleSe ityamaraH
'tezAmasi tvamuttamamanAsrAvamarogaRam' (aTarva0 232) AsravantItyAsrAvA atIsArAtimUtranAqIvraRAdayaH
'evA rogaM cAsrAvaM cAntastizWatu muYja it' (aTarva0 124) AsrAvo mUtrAtisAraH
'kaRwakopi duSCinna AsrAvaM janayecciram' (BA0 Adi0 2409) AsrAvaH kzatam iti nIlakaRWaH
'cyutezvAsrAvavad vidyAt' (gO0 Da0 1143) AsrAva Asyajalam
'tadvE rAzwramAsravati BinnAM nAvamivodakam' (aTarva0 5198) Asravati vfzwyA''plAvayati
'nAtapati prasrAvayeta nedetamamaBiprasrAvayA iti' (Sa0 brA0 141133) aBiprasrAvayet ABimuKyena mehet
'parisravecca satataM nOrviSIrReva sAgare' (BA0 SAM0 8514)
'parisravenmandaM mandamanyatra gacCet SanEriva SanakErivendrAyendo pari srava' (f0 8913) parisrava pavasva parito vaha

'rasaM parisrutA na rohitam' (tE0 brA0 5642) DArayA sravatsurAdravyaM parisrud ityucyata iti sAyaRaH loke tu surAmAtre vyavahriyate Aha cAmaraH- surA halipriyA hAlA parisrud varuRAtmajeti taTA ca BArate (vi0 165) prayogaH-anye Badre nayizyanti rAjaputryAH parisrutam**
'medasaH kulyA upa tAn sravantu' (vA0 saM0 3520) samIpe vahantu syandantAm
'patnyudakyA dIkzArUpARi niDAya sikatAsvAsItopasravaRAt' (kA0 SrO0 251113 ) A upasravaRAt A rajaHsrutivirAmAt
